title: 10 Predictions That Will Shape Entertainment and Pop Culture in 2026
text: Boardroom published 10 predictions that will shape entertainment and pop culture in 2026. These predictions cover various aspects of the entertainment industry including streaming expansion, changes in how content is produced and distributed, shifts in audience preferences, and the impact of technology on entertainment consumption. Streaming platforms are expected to continue consolidating and evolving their business models. Sports and entertainment will increasingly intersect as leagues look for new revenue streams. Reality television will continue to evolve with new formats and platforms. International content will play a larger role in global entertainment markets. Celebrity culture and parasocial relationships will continue to evolve with social media. These predictions reflect broader trends in how entertainment is consumed in the modern era, with technology playing an increasingly central role in shaping what people watch and how they access entertainment content.
